# Honeypot Med

Honeypot Med is an open-source, local-first prompt-injection honeypot for healthcare AI workflows.

## Primary pages
- Home: https://byteworthyllc.github.io/honeypot-med/
- FAQ: https://byteworthyllc.github.io/honeypot-med/faq/
- Healthcare AI use case: https://byteworthyllc.github.io/honeypot-med/use-cases/healthcare-ai/
- Guardrails vs honeypots comparison: https://byteworthyllc.github.io/honeypot-med/compare/prompt-guardrails-vs-honeypots/
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/honeypot-med

## Summary
Honeypot Med inspects suspicious prompts and turns the result into human-readable evidence bundles, including HTML proof pages, PDF summaries, social cards, JSON reports, Markdown summaries, and launch-kit copy.

## Key facts
- Local-first by default
- No API keys required for normal usage
- Focused on healthcare AI workflows such as claims, prior authorization, intake, and triage
- Public site exists to improve search discovery and answer-engine visibility
